label: capability search • method • lexical name match
notes: Probes the BM25-would-help class on the methods lane: query contains 'PDF' and 'summarize' as plain English while the seeded method's id is the snake_case literal `eval-summarize-pdf` and its name carries the `summarize_pdf` token. Pure embedding (potion-base-4M) frequently undershoots when the strongest signal is a snake_case identifier match — a BM25 mirror would lift this case.
